ananda ananda  is a global leader in electric drive systems for two-wheelers. through a defined strategic evolution�from component supplier to systems integrator, and finally to solution expert�we have become the core e-drive technology supplier to many of the world's leading two-wheeler brands.

we have established an end-to-end in-house r&d system covering motors, electronic controls, and sensors. by integrating global engineering and design expertise, we ensure our technology remains forward-looking and our products globally competitive. our smart manufacturing network in china, coupled with a global operational footprint across asia, europe, and the americas, forms an efficient and resilient supply chain. this enables rapid, reliable delivery and responsive service to our global customers.

we offer the industry�s most comprehensive product portfolio, featuring direct-drive hub motors, geared hub motors, and mid-drive motors, all supported by fully self-developed core electronic control units. our technologies in vehicle intelligence, high-reliability powertrains, and data connectivity have been industrialized at scale, providing proven, reliable solutions for the global market. as a certified national high-tech enterprise, our innovation capabilities and professional accomplishments are consistently recognized by industry and authoritative institutions.

guided by the principle of �global vision, local action,� we are committed to pioneering technology and sustainable development. with our jiangsu facility certified as a provincial green factory, we are on track to achieve 100% green energy usage across our operations by 2026 and are actively working toward science-based carbon targets. through our �green + smart� dual-drive strategy, we partner with industry leaders worldwide to co-create an intelligent and sustainable future of mobility. mid-motor

our humble beginning was out of pure frustration, as our progressive riding was limited by the components on offer. we vouched that we would create products that no longer hindered riders, but pushed them. at halo, we come to work everyday with this mission in mind.

our ethos

the rider firm: performance products for devoted riders

riders

family

better

positive change

invest respectfully
we are spending the riders' hard-earned money.

we are grateful
to riders, each other, industry partners & the wider community. pay it forward.

ananda ananda  is a global leader in electric drive systems for two-wheelers. through a defined strategic evolution�from component supplier to systems integrator, and finally to solution expert�we have become the core e-drive technology supplier to many of the world's leading two-wheeler brands.

we have established an end-to-end in-house r&d system covering motors, electronic controls, and sensors. by integrating global engineering and design expertise, we ensure our technology remains forward-looking and our products globally competitive. our smart manufacturing network in china, coupled with a global operational footprint across asia, europe, and the americas, forms an efficient and resilient supply chain. this enables rapid, reliable delivery and responsive service to our global customers.

we offer the industry�s most comprehensive product portfolio, featuring direct-drive hub motors, geared hub motors, and mid-drive motors, all supported by fully self-developed core electronic control units. our technologies in vehicle intelligence, high-reliability powertrains, and data connectivity have been industrialized at scale, providing proven, reliable solutions for the global market. as a certified national high-tech enterprise, our innovation capabilities and professional accomplishments are consistently recognized by industry and authoritative institutions.

guided by the principle of �global vision, local action,� we are committed to pioneering technology and sustainable development. with our jiangsu facility certified as a provincial green factory, we are on track to achieve 100% green energy usage across our operations by 2026 and are actively working toward science-based carbon targets. through our �green + smart� dual-drive strategy, we partner with industry leaders worldwide to co-create an intelligent and sustainable future of mobility. mid-motor

our humble beginning was out of pure frustration, as our progressive riding was limited by the components on offer. we vouched that we would create products that no longer hindered riders, but pushed them. at halo, we come to work everyday with this mission in mind.

our ethos

the rider firm: performance products for devoted riders

riders

family

better

positive change

invest respectfully
we are spending the riders' hard-earned money.

we are grateful
to riders, each other, industry partners & the wider community. pay it forward.
